reviews.comment:
Muy buena atención, los sándwiches de milanesa muy buenos y grandes. Los de jamón y queso y crudo y queso riquísimos también. Súper recomendable.

(Translated by Google)
Excellent service, the milanesa sandwiches are very good and large. The ham and cheese and prosciutto and cheese sandwiches are also delicious. Highly recommended.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/14840228736131746142/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURycktYak93EAE

reviews.comment:

reviews.comment:
Pare a tomar cafe, en la confiteria de la estacion de servicio, no en el restaurante grande.
Muy buena la atención y los precios bastante acomodados comparando el reztaurante/confitería grande.

(Translated by Google)
I stopped for coffee at the gas station café, not the large restaurant.
The service was very good and the prices were quite reasonable compared to the larger restaurant/café.
